articles.title: Google Releases Fitbit Air CAD Drawings & Specs: Bicep Bands Welcomed! - DC Rainmaker
articles.description: Google releases CAD drawings and specs for the Fitbit Air pod, allowing 3rd party companies to make band and accessories

articles.title: Shokz upgraded its open earbuds with better sound and a lighter design - The Verge
articles.description: Shokz’ clip-on open earbuds are now available in two versions with lighter designs, improved bass and clarity, and better noise reduction during calls.

articles.title: Nvidia takes AI battle from the data centre to the laptop - Financial Times
articles.description: Chipmaker opens new front in rivalry with Apple, Intel, AMD and Qualcomm

articles.title: Google AI Edge Gallery launches on macOS, letting Mac users run Gemini models locally - 9to5Mac
articles.description: In addition to Google AI Edge Gallery, the company also released the Gemma 4 12B model and the Google AI Edge Eloquent dictation app for the Mac.

articles.title: Report details Apple’s plan to use Nvidia chips for the Gemini-powered Siri - 9to5Mac
articles.description: A new report from The Information shares fresh details on how the new Gemini-powered Siri will work under the hood. Here are the details.
